title: Singapore Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Singapore with a Z-Score of +4.34. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10 and a CRITICAL Level.
body:
The current heat wave in Singapore is causing significant disruptions to daily life. 
 The high temperatures, with a CDD of 14.2 GG, are resulting in increased energy consumption. 
 The humidity level of 54% and wind speed of 7.7 km/h are exacerbating the situation, making it feel even hotter.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
